new_classes.label_en: Other non-alcoholic beverage containing fats from dairy products (headings 0401–0404), n.e.s. (subheading 2202 99 99)
new_classes.label_de: Andere nicht alkoholhaltige Getränke mit einem Gehalt an Fetten aus Erzeugnissen der Positionen 0401 bis 0404, anderweitig nicht genannt (Unterposition 2202 99 99)
new_classes.definition_en: Non-alcoholic beverage, other than those of subheadings 2202 99 91–2202 99 95, containing fats from products of headings 0401 to 0404, not elsewhere specified; includes commercially traded 'filled milk' products that are ready to drink, consisting of skimmed milk or skimmed milk powder to which refined vegetable fats or oils have been added, insofar as they do not fall under 2202 99 95.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the three main distinguishing criteria from the legal text: (1) containment of fats from dairy products of headings 0401–0404 (via BFO:has_part some RefinedFatFromDairyProducts0401to0404), (2) non-alcoholic nature (via has_quality some NonAlcoholicBeverageQuality), and (3) ready-to-drink character (via has_quality some ReadyForConsumptionQuality). The disjointness from FilledMilkBeverage22029995 (2202 99 95) is asserted to discriminate this residual 'other' subheading from its sibling. Coverage is reduced because: (a) the exact fat-content thresholds distinguishing 22029991–22029999 sub-ranges are not fully captured (the legal note indicates a range 22029991–22029999 differentiated by fat content percentage, but specific percentage thresholds are not provided in the available legal text fragment); (b) the 'skimmed milk or skimmed milk powder base + refined vegetable fats/oils' composition detail for the filled-milk cross-reference is not axiomatised with a SkimmedMilkBase part restriction (that detail applies to the sibling 22029995 rather than to this residual code); (c) no specific fat-percentage range restriction is modelled because the threshold values for this particular code are not given in the provided note text.
